ValidationRule.description: MQ-2139 Prevents sales rep from editing the contact country in case the contact sold to new contacts fields are checked
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( OR( $Profile.Name = 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name = 'SW Sales Internal',
$Profile.Name = 'SW CSM Internal', $Profile.Name = 'SW MIR', $Profile.Name = 'SW Client Services', $Profile.Name = 'SW Consultants', $Profile.Name = 'SW CSM Internal', $Profile.Name = 'SW Legal', $Profile.Name = 'SW Product', $Profile.Name = 'SW Marketing Ops', $Profile.Name = 'SW Sales Internal - STRAT', $Profile.Name = 'SW SDR Extended', $Profile.Name = 'SW Support', $Profile.Name = 'SW View All', $Profile.Name = 'SW Wolves', $Profile.Name = 'SW SDR', $Profile.Name = 'SW Sales External', $Profile.Name = 'SW Management' ),
Sold_To_New_quote__c = True,
ISCHANGED(MailingCountry)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are trying to edit the country to a sold to that has or had an open quote on him Please Contact Salesops to solve this issue
